title: How to get color from status color index?
excerpt: The webhook only return color index instead of color label so Is there any way to get color from color index ?

posts.author: thinhle183 (Thinh Le)
posts.cookedHtml: The webhook only return color index instead of color label so Is there any way to get color from color index ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @thinhle183,

You can use a query like this one to get the colors:

{
  boards(ids: 1234567890) {
    columns(ids: "status") {
      settings_str
    }
  }
}

I hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias
